text.content: Action items include verifying insurance coverage for genetic testing, discussing a partnership with a lab company specializing in services for ASD patients, and simplifying lab workflows. The clinic focuses on cost-effective care for families, offers various genetic tests, and aims to maximize patient outreach and compliance with HEDIS measures. The lab company proposes a gradual integration process and provides essential supplies at no charge, ensuring critical results are communicated promptly.
